case_title: GEORGE WILLIAM RODGERS VS. UNITED INTERNATIONAL INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES, A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODGERS, GEORGE WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED INTERNATIONAL INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODGERS, GEORGE WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED INTERNATIONAL INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. $5,328.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,432.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
